body.proposal: Adopt the standing-falsifier discipline: every load-bearing claim in the federation (a 'verified/sound/final/real/enforced' assertion that matters) must ship with an executable falsifier — a test or gate that goes red the instant the claim stops being true. Proven this session: src/audit_test.ts (gravity law), myc worker_test.ts (PWA commitment), omega honesty_triad_test.ts (mesh/Bitcoin). Reports rot; falsifiers do not.
